subcodes.first_line: O servant 'Abdu'r-Rahim! Hearken unto the Call of the All-Merciful from this glorious Scene. Verily, there is no God but Him, the Almighty, the Exalted, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قبل رحیم ان استمع ندآء الرحیم من هذا المنظر الکریم انه لا اله الا هو المقتدر العزیز الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
